title: Zoglin Miniboss
description: Makes the Zoglin into a miniboss with a powerful reward.
body:
# The Zoglin is usually just a novelty mob you see once for an advancement, or for an unusual farm, and leave it at that.

But as a miniboss, it can be a challenge with a powerful reward, that being the rotten tusk.

The Rotten Tusk gives potion effects for 3 minutes, those being:
- Strength 2 
- Speed 2 
- Absorption 4
- Hunger 2 

The Zoglin can't have a powerful reward without being buffed, so it has 100 health, some natural armor, extra damage and knockback, and increased size.

The Zoglin also drops rotten flesh, bones, and sometimes, a snout armor trim.
